markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 112. Powers & Duties of Railroads
##### § 112.155 — Certain Provisions Void

A provision of a contract, rule, or device the purpose of which is to exempt a railroad operator from liability under Section 112.152 (Liability Generally for Injury to or Death of Employee) is void to the extent of the purported exemption.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.03, eff. April 1, 2011.*
